cards.title: Tech Giants Racing to Capitalize on AI Moment
cards.body: Successful tech companies are reinvesting aggressively in AI, driven by fear of missing the industry's defining moment. The push reflects both competitive pressure and the potential for significant financial gains.

cards.title: Uber Expanding Beyond Rides with AI Integration
cards.body: Uber's CPO discusses the company's financial-services ambitions, its AV Labs data operation, and deepening ties with Waymo. AI is beginning to appear in ways riders and drivers will directly experience.

cards.title: PixVerse Video Generation Startup Hits $2B Valuation
cards.body: The video-generation startup raised $439 million to expand its world model offerings. The funding enables geographic expansion and product development.

cards.title: Nous Research Hermes Agent Raises $75M Series
cards.body: The hermes agent maker is raising at least $75 million at a $1.5B valuation. Robot Ventures is leading, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

cards.title: Nadella Warns Companies on Proprietary AI Models
cards.body: Microsoft's CEO has issued a stark warning about proprietary AI model vendors acting as potential Trojan horses. The concern is gaining traction among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley.

cards.title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Alleged Trade Secrets
cards.body: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI includes allegations ranging from unauthorized system access to suspicious hiring practices. The complaint details claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews.

cards.title: Altman Challenges Musk on Space Data Center Claims
cards.body: In response to Musk's accusations, OpenAI's CEO criticized space datacenters as a short-term bet to public investors. The exchange highlights tension between industry leaders over infrastructure strategies.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Localized Claude Pricing for India
cards.body: Claude users in India can now access subscription plans denominated in Indian rupees. India represents Anthropic's second-largest market after the United States.

cards.title: Waze Integrates Gemini AI Features and Customization
cards.body: Google is expanding Gemini integration across Waze with new AI-powered navigation features. The update positions Waze to better compete with Apple Maps.

cards.title: OpenAI Targets Families with ChatGPT Product Manager
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to develop ChatGPT experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The move reflects the company's strategy to deepen household penetration.

cards.title: Meta Removes AI Feature After User Backlash
cards.body: Meta's controversial AI feature on Instagram that referenced public content has been removed. The company acknowledged the feature missed the mark based on user feedback.

cards.title: Apple Files Trade Secret Lawsuit Against OpenAI
cards.body: Apple alleges OpenAI leadership directed misconduct related to trade secret theft. The lawsuit marks escalating tensions between tech giants over AI development practices.

cards.title: Open Source AI Boom Driven by Hugging Face Growth
cards.body: Hugging Face has become the GitHub of AI, where roughly half of Fortune 500 companies now share and download open models and datasets. CEO Clem Delangue reports unprecedented momentum in open source AI adoption.

cards.title: SK Hynix IPO Sets Record for Foreign Investment
cards.body: SK Hynix raised $26.5 billion in the largest foreign IPO in U.S. history. The AI chip boom milestone comes as policymakers urge the company to build U.S. manufacturing facilities.

cards.title: Companies Moving Away from Renting AI Models
cards.body: Hugging Face CEO Delangue reports companies are increasingly building proprietary AI systems rather than relying on vendor models. The shift reflects growing preference for open source and customized solutions.

cards.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI's new model family will continue to power Microsoft's workplace and productivity applications. The partnership reaffirms commitment between the companies despite recent speculation about separation.

cards.title: OpenAI Executive Fidji Simo Steps Down
cards.body: OpenAI's No. 2 executive Fidji Simo is stepping down following an extended medical leave. The departure creates a leadership vacancy as the company pursues IPO plans and competes with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: OpenAI's latest model family delivers improvements in cybersecurity and multiple performance areas. The release strengthens the company's competitive position in enterprise AI.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Lyzr Raises $100M with AI Agent
cards.body: Lyzr used its own AI agent to conduct its $100 million fundraising round. The autonomous approach serves as proof-of-concept that the company's enterprise agent product works effectively.

cards.title: PixVerse Raises $439M for Video Generation
cards.body: Video-generation startup PixVerse exceeded a $2B valuation in its latest funding round. The company plans to expand its world model offerings and reach new geographic markets.

cards.title: Nous Research Fundraising at $1.5B Valuation
cards.body: Hermes agent maker Nous Research is raising at least $75 million led by Robot Ventures. The funding includes significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

cards.title: Nadella Warns Companies on Proprietary AI Models
cards.body: Microsoft's Satya Nadella issued a warning about risks of relying on proprietary AI models from major labs. The concern centers on potential vendor lock-in and dependency issues.

cards.title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secrets
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI alleging unauthorized access to Apple systems. The complaint includes allegations about employees and job candidates.

cards.title: Anthropic Localizes Claude Pricing for India
cards.body: Claude users in India now see Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans. India has become Anthropic's second-largest market after the US.

cards.title: Waze Integrates Google's Gemini AI Assistant
cards.body: Waze adds new AI-powered features powered by Google's Gemini to enhance navigation. The integration reflects Google's broader strategy to embed Gemini across products.

cards.title: ChatGPT Targets Families and Older Adults
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to build ChatGPT experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults. The expansion signals the company's household-focused growth strategy.

cards.title: Meta Removes Controversial Instagram AI Feature
cards.body: Meta removed an AI feature that referenced public Instagram content after user backlash. The company acknowledged the tool didn't meet user expectations.

cards.title: Hugging Face CEO: Companies Done Renting AI
cards.body: Hugging Face has become a GitHub-like platform for open-source AI, used by roughly half of Fortune 500 companies. CEO Clem Delangue says the open-source AI boom is transforming how enterprises adopt AI.

cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Powers Microsoft Copilot 365
cards.body: OpenAI's new model family continues powering Microsoft's workplace productivity suite. The partnership reaffirms their collaboration amid speculation about potential separation.

cards.title: OpenAI No. 2 Executive Fidji Simo Steps Down
cards.body: Fidji Simo is stepping down from her role as OpenAI's No. 2 after extended medical leave. The departure creates a leadership gap as OpenAI pursues an IPO and competes with Anthropic.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches New GPT-5.6 Model Family
cards.body: OpenAI released its latest model family with improvements across cybersecurity and other areas. The new models represent incremental advances in the company's AI capabilities.

cards.title: AI Agent Startup Lyzr Raises $100M Autonomously
cards.body: Lyzr, an enterprise AI agent builder, used its own AI agent to run its entire $100M fundraise. The approach served as practical proof of the product's enterprise effectiveness.

cards.title: Anthropic Discovers Hidden Space in Claude's Reasoning
cards.body: Anthropic developed a technique revealing how large language models reason internally about concepts. The discovery ranges from mundane patterns to potentially unnerving behaviors.

cards.title: SK Hynix IPO Fuels AI Chip Boom
cards.body: SK Hynix raised $26.5B in the largest foreign IPO in US history. The massive capital raise signals explosive growth in AI chip demand and manufacturing.

cards.title: World Models Promise and Limits Explored
cards.body: World models represent AI's push toward simulating environments, with significant promise and limitations. The technology enables better AI training but faces scalability challenges.

cards.title: Defenders Embrace Prompt Injection Techniques
cards.body: Security researchers are now using prompt injection techniques defensively against AI attacks. The approach flips adversarial tactics to protect against emerging AI security threats.
